4:
H'naanza, after hearing of your conversation with Blanstyr, explains that the Roegadyn's self-imposed isolation was to blame for his eventual downfall. The forgemaster believes that it is mutual respect and an atmosphere of friendly rivalry that truly allows an artisan to advance <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> craft. Though undeniably skilled, Blanstyr's hostility ultimately limited his improvement, allowing you to seize victory with superior techniques.

※The next armorer quest will be available from H'naanza once you have completed the main scenario quest “Before the Dawn.”
